passives.desc:
Encounter Start: gain [TeachersCommand]
In a Clash against Ryōshū, Clash Power -3 and convert the Coins on this unit's Base Attack Skills into [SuperCoin]s.
Also, on Clash Lose, deal -80% damage and any "On Hit" effects do not activate
passives.name: A Textbook with a Singular Purpose

passives.desc:
After Clashing, inflict 1 [DuelEdge] against the target this unit Clashed against
In a Clash against targets with [DuelEdge], heal 3 SP for every [DuelEdge] Stack on target (max 15)
passives.name: Duello

passives.desc:
Gain the following effects based on the target's [DuelEdge] Stack
- For every Stack, deal +5% damage against and take -5% damage from the target with [DuelEdge]
- At 1+ Stack, in a Clash against targets with [DuelEdge], gain Clash Power +1
- At 2+ Stack, in a Clash against targets with [DuelEdge], gain Base Power +1
- At 3+ Stack, in a Clash against targets with [DuelEdge], gain Coin Power +1 and inflict 3 [SeveredTendon] On Hit
- At 4+ Stack, in a Clash against targets with [DuelEdge], gain Final Power +1
passives.name: Palermitan Style

passives.desc:
Every 3 turns, select a random enemy (except Ryōshū), reduce their Speed to 1, and target it with all of this unit's Skills
(If this effect could not be activated due to Stagger, activate it next turn)
passives.name: Hunter's Mark

passives.desc: If this unit's Skill effects triggered [VibrationExplosion], gain 2 [AttackUp] next turn (3 times per turn)
passives.name: Palermitan Rapier / The Cleaving Blade

passives.desc: Turn End: if in Panic, reset SP to 0.
passives.name: Panic Recovery

passives.desc: This unit's Panic Type does not change when inflicted with an effect that changes Panic Types. Instead, this unit is inflicted with an effect that is inflicted against Non-SP Units.
passives.name: Fixed Panic

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

skills.desc: Base Power +1 for every 4 ([Combustion] + [Vibration]) on target (max 2)
skills.name: Colpi Sottani

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

skills.desc:
Coin Power +1 for every 4 ([Combustion] + [Vibration]) on target (max 2)

[WhenUse] If target has [DuelEdge], convert all Coins on this Skill to [SuperCoin]s
skills.name: Il Cacciatore

descs: [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion] 2 times; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 2
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion] 2 times; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 2

skills.desc: [CantChangeTarget] Cannot be Staggered before using this Skill For every Attack Skill of this unit that lost a Clash this turn, Final Power -2 and Atk Weight -1 (Min. Atk Weight: 1) [DefeatDuel] Deal -90% damage and damage dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target [DefeatDuel] Lose 15 SP; next turn, gain 6 Offense Level Down
skills.name: Sezionatura di Cervo

skills.desc:
[DuelCounter]
If target has 2+ [DuelEdge], deal +30% damage

[WinDuel] Inflict 1 [DuelEdge]
skills.name: Measuring Blade Reach

passives.desc: If the main target has 3+ types of negative effects, Final Power +1
passives.name: The Ring Nursefather's Artwork

skills.desc:
If target has 5+ [Laceration], Base Power +1
If target has 3+ types of negative effects, deal +30% damage
skills.name: Vascular Tear

skills.desc:
[CanDuelGuard]
[StartBattle] Gain 1 [MuscleContraction] next turn. When hit, gain 1 additional [MuscleContraction] (once per turn)
skills.name: Muscular Contraction
